appDesc.message: ディスレクシア対応 Web 読み上げ (速度調整、ふりがな、難読箇所ハイライト)

popup_bookmark_empty.message: まだブックマークはありません

popup_bookmark_added.message: ブックマークに追加しました

popup_bookmark_failed.message: ブックマークに失敗しました

popup_bookmark_limit.message: 上限に達しました (Premium で解除)
popup_bookmark_limit.description: Status when free bookmark limit reached

popup_bookmark_unavailable.message: このページではブックマークできません
popup_bookmark_unavailable.description: Shown for pages where bookmarking is blocked

popup_status_playing.description: Status text while TTS is playing

popup_status_paused.description: Status text while TTS is paused

popup_status_stopped.description: Status text while TTS is stopped

popup_status_no_selection.message: テキストを選択してください
popup_status_no_selection.description: Shown when play is pressed without any selected text

premium_badge_free.description: Badge label shown to free-tier users

premium_badge_trial.description: Badge label shown to users in trial

premium_badge_premium.description: Badge label shown to premium users

premium_trial_remaining.description: Trial countdown shown to users in trial; $1 is days remaining

premium_trial_ended.message: お試し期間が終了しました
premium_trial_ended.description: Shown after trial has expired for non-premium users

premium_upgrade_cta.message: Premium にアップグレード

premium_locked_hint.description: Inline hint shown next to locked features

premium_bookmarks_unlimited.message: ブックマーク: 無制限
premium_bookmarks_unlimited.description: Caption shown when user has unlimited bookmarks

premium_bookmarks_limited.message: ブックマーク: 残り $1/$2
premium_bookmarks_limited.description: Caption shown to free users; $1 is remaining count, $2 is cap
